qa_pairs.question: What CUDA version is required for running simulations on A100 GPUs on Narval?
qa_pairs.answer: CUDA 11.4 is required for running simulations on A100 GPUs installed on Narval.

qa_pairs.question: Which specific programs are included in CPU-only Amber/20 modules?
qa_pairs.answer: CPU-only Amber/20 modules provide all MD programs available in AmberTools/20, plus pmemd (serial) and pmemd.MPI (parallel).

qa_pairs.question: What additional programs do GPU modules offer for molecular dynamics simulations?
qa_pairs.answer: GPU modules add pmemd.cuda for single GPU simulations and pmemd.cuda.MPI for multi-GPU simulations.

qa_pairs.question: If I am using A100 GPUs on Narval for simulations, what CUDA version do I need?
qa_pairs.answer: You will need CUDA 11.4 for running simulations on A100 GPUs installed on Narval.

qa_pairs.question: Do CPU-only Amber/20 modules include pmemd?
qa_pairs.answer: Yes, CPU-only modules provide pmemd (serial) and pmemd.MPI (parallel), in addition to all MD programs from AmberTools/20.

qa_pairs.question: What are the pmemd variants available with GPU modules?
qa_pairs.answer: GPU modules provide pmemd.cuda for single GPU use and pmemd.cuda.MPI for multi-GPU use.
